cli.help.about: Oracle Cloud CLI and bot runner
cli.help.after:
Examples:
  oci-sniper --lang en run --dry-run
  oci-sniper --lang zh-CN test-api --dump-launch-payload
  oci-sniper bot-webhook --set https://example.com/webhook
cli.help.arg.config: Path to the TOML config file.
cli.help.cmd.run: Load config and start the runtime and Telegram bot.
cli.help.cmd.test_api: Run a single OCI signed API test request.
cli.help.cmd.bot_webhook: Set or clear the Telegram bot webhook.
cli.help.arg.run.dry_run: Resolve config and print the launch payload without starting the runtime.
cli.help.arg.test_api.dump_launch_payloa: Print the resolved OCI launch payload after the auth test succeeds.
cli.help.arg.bot_webhook.set: Set the Telegram webhook URL and switch runtime mode to webhook.
cli.help.arg.bot_webhook.clear: Clear the Telegram webhook and switch runtime mode back to polling.
cli.runtime.bootstrap: Runtime bootstrap completed; logging and bot loop will continue in subsequent modules.
cli.bot.disabled: Telegram bot token not configured; run mode is limited to local bootstrap.
cli.bot.starting_polling: Starting Telegram bot in polling mode.
cli.bot.starting_webhook: Starting Telegram bot in webhook mode at {url}.
cli.bot.webhook_missing_url: Webhook mode requires telegram.webhook_url in the config or via bot-webhook --set.
cli.runtime.lock_busy: Another oci-sniper process is already running. Lock file: {path}
bot.command.log.empty: No logs available at the moment.
bot.command.logs.archive_too_large: The log archive exceeds Telegram's upload limit. Try /logs 1 or another smaller number.
bot.command.logs.latest_empty: The latest log file is empty.
